title: Food Hub in Āgenskalns
subtitle: Practical recommendations
description: A summary of a sustainable and inclusive urban food hub in the Āgenskalns district of Riga designed to strengthen the local food economy and improve community wellbeing. It outlines practical recommendations for implementing a multifunctional market infrastructure, combining a food market, co-creation kitchen, educational activities, and social events to boost farmers’ performance and promote sustainable consumption.
